mapper.select: SELECT ir.*, d.drug_name, CASE ir.order_type WHEN '采购' THEN '采购预占' WHEN '销售' THEN '销售预占' WHEN '调拨' THEN '调拨预占' ELSE ir.order_type END as order_type_desc FROM inventory_reserve ir LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON ir.drug_id = d.drug_id WHERE ir.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY ir.create_time DESC

SELECT ir.*, d.drug_name, CASE ir.order_type WHEN '采购' THEN '采购预占' WHEN '销售' THEN '销售预占' WHEN '调拨' THEN '调拨预占' ELSE ir.order_type END as order_type_desc FROM inventory_reserve ir LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON ir.drug_id = d.drug_id WHERE ir.order_type = #{orderType} AND ir.status = '预占中' ORDER BY ir.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_reserve SET status = '已释放' WHERE status = '预占中' AND expire_time < NOW()
